items.headline: Diamondbacks host the Padres to begin 2-game series
items.description:
San Diego Padres (17-8, first in the NL West) vs. Arizona Diamondbacks (14-11, third in the NL West)
Mexico City; Saturday, 6:05 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Blue Jays take home losing streak into matchup with the Guardians
items.description:
Cleveland Guardians (15-12, first in the AL Central) vs. Toronto Blue Jays (10-15, fourth in the AL East)
Toronto; Saturday, 3:07 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Rockies bring 1-0 series advantage over Mets into game 2
items.description:
Colorado Rockies (11-16, fifth in the NL West) vs. New York Mets (9-17, fourth in the NL East)
New York; Saturday, 4:10 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Miami Marlins and San Francisco Giants play in game 2 of series
items.description:
Miami Marlins (13-13, second in the NL East) vs. San Francisco Giants (11-15, fourth in the NL West)
San Francisco; Saturday, 4:05 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Nationals enter matchup with the White Sox on losing streak
items.description:
Washington Nationals (11-16, third in the NL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (11-15, fourth in the AL Central)
Chicago; Saturday, 4:10 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Reds face the Tigers leading series 1-0
items.description:
Detroit Tigers (14-13, second in the AL Central) vs. Cincinnati Reds (17-9, second in the NL Central)
Cincinnati; Saturday, 7:15 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Athletics bring 1-0 series advantage over Rangers into game 2
items.description:
Athletics (14-12, first in the AL West) vs. Texas Rangers (13-13, second in the AL West)
Arlington, Texas; Saturday, 7:05 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Phillies come into matchup against the Braves on losing streak
items.description:
Philadelphia Phillies (8-18, fifth in the NL East) vs. Atlanta Braves (19-8, first in the NL East)
Atlanta; Saturday, 7:15 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Royals bring 1-0 series advantage over Angels into game 2
items.description:
Los Angeles Angels (12-15, third in the AL West) vs. Kansas City Royals (9-17, fifth in the AL Central)
Kansas City, Missouri; Saturday, 7:10 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Cubs try to extend win streak, take on the Dodgers
items.description:
Chicago Cubs (17-9, first in the NL Central) vs. Los Angeles Dodgers (17-9, second in the NL West)
Los Angeles; Saturday, 7:15 p.m. EDT
